## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `black medipixel/` before committing
- [ ] New functions in `core/` have type hints and docstrings
- [ ] `core/` files do not import PyQt5, pyqtgraph, or matplotlib
- [ ] I updated `docs/` if the change affects user-facing behaviour
- [ ] I updated `docs/changelog.md`
